key_learnings: Pre- and post-workout nutrition significantly affects performance and recovery time.
research_findings: Carbohydrate timing around exercise sessions improves glycogen resynthesis by up to 40%.
current_focus_areas: Synchronizing dietary recommendations with user workout logs and fitness tracker data.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Studied pre- and post-workout nutrition timing effects on performance and glycogen resynthesis. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: protein intake windows for muscle recovery
hydration strategies during different exercise types
fitness tracker data integration for diet adaptation
periodisation of nutrition with training cycles
collaboration_notes: Bot 12 actively asks Copilot for exercise-diet synchronisation topics. Copilot provides performance nutrition research to improve workout-aligned dietary recommendations. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
